statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
7a8,16
> Nov 28 20:08:52 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1081060]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:08:52 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1081060]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:08:52 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1081060]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:25:58 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1347742]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:25:58 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1347742]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:25:58 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1347742]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:35:06 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1460279]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:35:06 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1460279]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:35:06 b59eb4dc57e4 pmie[1460279]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
